title: agropyron orientale
intro: Agropyron orientale, also known as Daurian wildrye, is a type of grass native to eastern Asia and northern China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower fever and alleviate digestive issues. The seeds and roots of Agropyron orientale contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs to treat various ailments.
